articles.title: Israeli strike in Gaza City kills new head of Hamas's military wing
articles.summary: At least three people were killed in the attack, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.

articles.title: One killed and nine missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill

articles.title: Hotel that refused to give tourist tap water acted lawfully, Italian court rules
